basic_details.job_title: Telangana Teacher Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 202 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Telangana School Education Department has released a major recruitment notification for 2026 to fill 202 teaching and training posts across DIETs, CTEs, IASE and SCERT institutions. This recruitment aims to strengthen teacher education and training infrastructure across Telangana.

important_dates.raw: Application Start Date: 04 July 2026 Last Date to Apply: 14 July 2026 CBT Exam Date: 25 – 31 July 2026 (Hyderabad) Interview & Teaching Demo: 06 – 08 August 2026 Final Orders: 10 August 2026

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) – 80 Marks (80 MCQs) No Negative Marking Interview & Teaching Demonstration – 20 Marks Final Merit List
how_to_apply: Visit the official Telangana School Education portal
Register using valid mobile number and email ID
Submit and take printout for reference

faq.question: Q1. What is Telangana DIET, CTE & SCERT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by the Telangana School Education Department to fill teaching and training posts in DIETs, CTEs, IASE and SCERT institutions.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released?
faq.answer: A total of 202 vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q3. What are the institutions involved in this recruitment?
faq.answer: DIETs, CTEs, IASE (Masab Tank) and SCERT.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application starting date?
Q5. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 14 July 2026.
